news.title: IBM stock closes down more than 25% after preannounced earnings results
news.summary: IBM stock collapsed 25% after the company preannounced its Q2 earnings results.

news.title: CrowdStrike, Fortinet and others surge on IBM warning of customer spending shift
news.summary: CrowdStrike and other cybersecurity-related stocks surged as IBM warned of a spending shift among enterprise customers.

news.title: IBM stock crashes after major warning — here's what Wall Street is doing next
news.summary: IBM stock plunged after an unexpected pre-earnings warning.

news.title: IBM stock plunges over 20% on preliminary Q2 results: What to know
news.summary: IBM (IBM) stock is plunging upwards of 20% in Tuesday's pre-market trading after releasing weaker-than-expected preliminary second quarter earnings results. Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley to discuss IBM's stock reaction to these results. IBM is scheduled to release its full second quarter figures on Wednesday, July 22.

news.title: Why Micron (MU) Stock Is Up Today
news.summary: Shares of memory chips maker Micron (NASDAQ:MU) jumped 4.2% in the afternoon session after a cooler-than-expected June inflation report and a surprise capital expenditure warning from IBM appeared to validate AI hardware demand.

news.title: Dow Jones Futures: Goldman, CrowdStrike Jump, AI Stocks Need To Do This; ASML, Morgan Stanley Due
news.summary: The Nasdaq and AI stocks rallied, but still face key resistance. Goldman and CrowdStrike make big bullish moves.

news.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Leads The Day; Yum Brands Falls On Report Of Taco Bell Investigation (Live Coverage)
news.summary: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index creeps up Tuesday even as IBM stock tanks. CrowdStrike tops the S&P 500.

news.title: Gartner and DXC Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
news.summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after IBM issued a second-quarter revenue warning, suggesting that the enterprise shift toward AI hardware may be constricting demand for large-scale consulting projects.
